results.title: Best Interactive Whiteboard Alternative? | Avocor
results.content:
Interactive Displays

Interactive displays (interactive whiteboard screens) are an alternative which eliminate many of the problems that interactive whiteboards and projectors face. When considering an interactive projector vs. an interactive display board, there are some crucial differences between the two. These should be assessed when office workers or teachers are deciding on which equipment is best for them.

The differences are:

• Interactive displays have a lot of similarities to iPads or tablets, meaning they are instantly familiar  
• They don’t need an external computer to operate  
• Displays offer crisp, high quality, bright images, keeping the audience engaged  
• It is possible to use the interface with just a finger [...] Interactive displays’ huge benefit is that they can operate independently. Imagine a huge iPad on a wall – interactive displays are very similar to this. Avocor’s interactive displays are optimised for Windows 10, delivering a flawless, user-friendly experience.

The image quality is another huge benefit to using interactive displays. Projectors often give low quality, dark images; often the room needs to be in complete darkness to even see the screen! However, the brightness of interactive displays means that they can be used in the daylight. This makes them much more professional and convenient to use. [...] We’ve looked at a range of interactive whiteboard alternatives here, both budget friendly ones and some of the best types on the market! For most businesses and schools, interactive displays deliver the most cost effective yet high performing solution. Avocor offer a range of interactive displays that are perfect for your business or school needs, with 4K screen resolution and optimised for Windows 10, Avocor interactive displays offer a instantly familiar platform, just like using a giant tablet on the wall.

results.title: Best Genially Alternatives to Create Interactive & AI Presentations
results.content:
Visme: Best for solos, teams and enterprise businesses that need interactive content with strong AI features, granular customization, collaboration, analytics and multi-format content creation.
 Canva: Best for creating quick, good-looking presentations using template-driven designs or AI-assisted layouts, with minimal setup and a low learning curve.
 Piktochart: Best for content-heavy, business-focused visuals like reports, infographics and data-driven presentations with a broad AI creation suite.
 Prezi: Best for zoom-based, story-driven presentations that focus on flow and movement.
 Pitch: Best for no-frills, collaborative team presentations.
 Beautiful.ai: Best when you want the tool to handle layout decisions and design consistency for you. [...] ### What Makes a Great Genially Alternative?

The best Genially alternative will typically offer:

 Interactive elements that work across business, training and marketing use cases
 Collaboration and workflow features designed for teams (not just individuals)
 Analytics that go beyond basic views and clicks
 Additional content formats like videos, forms or lead magnets
 Support for learning standards such as SCORM and xAPI when training is involved
 AI assistants that help with creation, editing and reuse without taking away control

This is the framework I used to evaluate each Genially alternative.

## How We Tested and Compared These Genially Alternatives [...] Skywork.ai: Best for fully AI-generated presentations where content source and research are a must-have.
 Mentimeter: Best for live audience engagement, polls, quizzes, and real-time participation during meetings, classes or workshops.

THE 7 BEST NAVATTIC ALTERNATIVES (2026)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ [...] 🟢 Everyday interactive demo tools
• Supademo — the all-rounder. The most formats (HTML, screenshot, video, screen recording, desktop, Figma); AI translation/analytics/branching not gated ($38/mo); a controlled AI Demo Agent that surfaces approved demos (~$0.50–0.80/conversation, no live-product driving); free plan = 5 demos.
• Storylane — the sales-demo-automation pick. Deal intelligence + a RepX AI agent. Best for sales-led teams with that can spend $500/mo+.

• HowdyGo — the unlimited-seats pick. Simple HTML demos, unlimited users, flat ~$159/mo. No free plan.
